Captain: * Not Signed Up = exact or resolved name matched in club records, but no current paid 2026 membership was found.
** No Match = no unique exact-name match was found in current club member/contact records.
*** Override = resolved by an explicit override; this usually represents a typo or misspelling in the source data.
**** Nickname = resolved by a short-name or nickname rule; this may also represent a typo or misspelling in the source data.
***** Fuzzy = resolved by the cautious fuzzy fallback; this represents a typo or misspelling in the source data.
